steps.title: Match quotation to ambition
steps.content: The claim has two parts: Joanna admires ambition in other people, and she does so to the exclusion of all other qualities. The supporting quotation must show both interest in purposeful people and indifference toward people who lack that quality.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant quotations
steps.content: Choice A describes Joanna's own intellectual traits. Choice B shows preference for her father without linking it to ambition. Choice D mentions ambition but also adds willingness to work, weakening the "exclusion" part. The remaining quotation shows interest in purpose and no interest otherwise. The answer is C.
